original_snippet_context: Discussing the Convênio de Taubaté and its approval by the National Congress.
relevant_quote: E.-la approvado çòpívenio pelo Congresso Nacional o Convênio de Taiilinté, na parlf ri laliva á valorisação do café
justification: This mentions the approval of the Convênio de Taubaté, which is related to the context of the Caixa de Conversão (e.g., its funding mechanism proposed in Article 8), but it doesn't express an opinion on the Caixa itself or any related monetary policy.
